allow: PowerShell(Get-ChildItem "$env:TEMP" | Where-Object {$_.Name -match "\\.\(jpg|jpeg|png|webp\)$"} | Sort-Object LastWriteTime -Descending | Select-Object -First 20 | Format-Table Name, LastWriteTime, Length)
PowerShell(Get-ChildItem "$env:TEMP" | Sort-Object LastWriteTime -Descending | Select-Object -First 30 | Format-Table Name, LastWriteTime, Length)
